def negative_test_compares_float_with_equality_operator():
    rule_id = "test_compares_float_with_equality_operator"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test uses == to compare floating-point values instead of pytest.approx or math.isclose."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
